title: Ontology Entity Extraction Patterns (patterns.json)
description: Schema for entity extraction patterns bound to SKOS concept URIs. See ADR-018.

schema_version.description: Schema version for forward compatibility. Must be 1.0 for ADR-018.

domain.description: Domain name. Must match pack.json domain.

id.description: Unique pattern identifier within this file

concept_uri.description: SKOS concept URI from the pack's vocab.skos.jsonld. Binds the pattern to a vocabulary concept.

entity_type.description: Semantic type of the extracted entity (e.g. amount, iban, date, name)

capture_groups.description: Maps regex capture group numbers (as strings) to named fields

type.description: Target data type for normalisation (e.g. decimal, string, date)

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for amount normalisation

transform.description: String transform to apply (e.g. upper, lower, trim)

examples.description: Example inputs that should match. Used for testing and documentation.

patterns.description: Ordered list of entity extraction patterns
